headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Essex Property Trust, Raises Price Target to $277
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $272 to $277.
